fetch_note: Direct HTTP fetch blocked by environment allowlist. All candidate data sourced from indexed content, title tags, indexed section structures, and conversion-pattern analysis captured in research files 01-agencies.md, 04-cro-patterns.md, and 06-seo-landscape.md.

candidates.notes: Top-cited sales agency in research. Claims '#1 B2B Lead Generation Agency'. Indexed structure shows full CRO wireframe: hero, logo bar, services grid, case studies with metrics, how-it-works, FAQ, final CTA.
Hybrid agency+SaaS platform positioning. Indexed as 'B2B Sales Agency and SDR Lead Generation Platform'. Heavy technology/integration emphasis. CTA: 'Get Started'.
Outsourced and fractional sales leadership. Advisor-matching marketplace model. CTA: 'Find an Advisor' / 'Find a Sales Leader'. Trust built through individual advisor profiles.
Outcome-led hero with tech/SaaS niche specificity. Includes explicit build-vs-buy objection-handling section. Named case studies with metrics. Strong alignment with universal CRO wireframe.
Ranks for 'outsourced SDR' queries. Focused on enterprise pipeline generation. Cited alongside Belkins and SalesHive as a top-ranked competitor for SDR outsourcing terms.
Ranks for 'sales outsourcing companies' and 'B2B sales outsourcing'. Produces comparison content as a category strategy ('Belkins vs CIENCE'). Authority-level brand recognition.
Cited in SEO landscape as a ranked competitor. Focused on outbound sales and pipeline development. Smaller brand profile than Belkins/CIENCE but included as a conversion-pattern reference.
Fractional and outsourced sales consulting. Appears in category searches alongside Sales Xceleration and Victory Lap. Consultant-led model with individual practitioner emphasis.
